caption: A man wearing a green t-shirt and a dark green baseball cap with black headphones speaks into a black microphone. His t-shirt features the white printed text "ION NEVER DO SHIT". He is situated in a room decorated with several framed photographs on the wall behind him and a white mannequin wearing white clothing nearby. To his right, clothing racks are visible in the background. A small red and white logo reading "MODESTLY TOT" appears on the right side of the screen, and a black and white circular logo is on the left. Across the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, gesturing slightly with his mouth as he speaks, while the overall environment and equipment remain static.
